_comment: Multi-lab mutation audit baseline. Captures the count of known violations as of the discovery PR (2026-06-07). scripts/audit_multilab_mutations.py fails CI if the current count exceeds the per-page baseline below, so new code can't introduce new violations. Drive these to zero over a series of fix PRs; each fix lowers the per-page count.
_canonical_fix: PR #606 (VeritaTrack Add Task) — pass trackApi/tasksKey/dashKey props from the page-level scope into mutation components; POST to ${trackApi}/<endpoint>; invalidateQueries({queryKey: [tasksKey/dashKey]}).

_notes.AccountSettingsPage.tsx: CLEARED 2026-06-07: confirmed user-scoped endpoints. Both /api/account/settings and /api/onboarding/status moved to EXEMPT_PREFIXES in audit_multilab_mutations.py.
_notes.VeritaCheckPage.tsx: CLEARED 2026-06-07: /api/studies is the legacy single-lab endpoint that pre-dates Tier 2. The page already invalidates BOTH the unscoped and scoped queryKey (belt-and-suspenders pattern). Exempted /api/studies in EXEMPT_PREFIXES.
_notes.VeritaCheckVerificationPage.tsx: CLEARED 2026-06-07: real bug. onDeleted + onCreated callbacks were invalidating the hardcoded unscoped key instead of the verificationsUrl variable that already correctly switches on activeLabId. Fixed both call sites in the same PR.
_notes.VeritaCompAppPage.tsx: PROBABLE REAL BUG, LARGEST SURFACE: 16 invalidations across /api/competency/* and /api/veritacomp/* paths on a lab-aware page. Almost certainly matches the VeritaTrack bug class exactly. Highest-priority remaining fix.
